name: maxx
description: A local Codex usage fuel gauge and context companion.

interface.shortDescription: See Codex limits, tokens, context, and streaks
interface.longDescription: Maxx turns Codex usage and local token metadata into a clear fuel gauge, history card, and context-health report without sending data to Maxx or another third party.
defaultPrompt: Use $maxx:usage to show my Codex fuel gauge.
Use $maxx:usage to optimize this Codex session.
Use $maxx:usage to configure my Codex status line.
